summary: Two "Yolka" air defense drones simultaneously intercepted an enemy fixed-wing UAV with kinetic strikes in a Russian region, with two mobile fire team crews engaging the target at once. On April 2–3, 2026, the Rubicon Center conducted 78,499 combat sorties, destroying 118 targets including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, personnel, armored vehicles, artillery, and UAV control points. Ukrainian operators from the 1st Separate Special Operations Center, in coordination with Ukraine's Defense Intelligence, struck an enemy UAV storage facility, aircraft, and radar station in occupied Crimea, targeting Orion-type drones valued at over $5 million. Russian forces dropped fake money with QR codes from "Gerbera" drones over border regions as an information operation, while an FPV drone captured an airstrike on a Ukrainian air defense system in Vozdvizhevka, Zaporizhzhia. A Russian Ka-52 was downed near Nadiivka, Donetsk, with additional drones striking the crew during their evacuation attempt.
